title: Savory Sausage Chana Masala
description: A flavorful twist on traditional Indian cuisine, combining sausages with the popular chana masala recipe. A hearty and aromatic dish perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the grated ginger and cook for another minute.
Add the robustly spiced indian and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the canned chana masala, coconut milk, salt, and black pepper. Stir well.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and let cook for 10-15 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened.
Add the sliced sausages to the pan and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until cooked through.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve hot over rice or with naan bread.
